TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Xi_Jinping, title = Xi_Jinping, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Xi_Jinping} }

S.FORM: I 1953 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Xi Jinping, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no China anini i ci Xi Jinping, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 15 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i xi *inpiŇč, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶ńßina anini i ¶i xi *inpiŇč, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1953 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Xi Jinping, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no China anini i ci Xi Jinping, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 15 a romi'ad.
